[9] Apple plays catch-up at WWDC
    Source: TechCrunch | Published: Mon, 08 Jun 2026 21:15:42 +000

----------------------------------------------------------------------

[10] Apple bets cheaper AI will woo small developers
    Source: TechCrunch | Published: Mon, 08 Jun 2026 20:53:55 +000

history.content:
Here are the latest technology news updates:

## 🚀 **Top Technology News**

### **Space & Innovation**
**[1] E-scooter founder raises $5M for space data centers**
Orbital founder Euwyn Poon (who built 250,000 scooters at Spin) wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.
[Read more](https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/09/how-an-e-scooter-founder-raised-5-million-to-build-space-data-centers/)

### **Transportation & EV**
**[2] Evotrex raises $30M for off-grid RV**
Anker-backed startup building an RV that doesn't need charging stations with hybrid power system.
[Read more](https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/09/anker-backed-evotrex-raises-30m-to-build-its-off-grid-rv/)

### **AI & Big Tech**
**[3] Zepto's IPO filing reveals growth trajectory**
Advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing 104% operating revenue growth.

**[4] Apple's AI strategy paying off**
After slow start, Apple's AI investments are showing results with successful WWDC demos.

**[8] OpenAI confidentially files for IPO**
Following Anthropic's lead, OpenAI is preparing for public market debut.

**[9] Apple plays catch-up at WWDC**
Focus on fixes and performance improvements before unveiling AI-powered Siri upgrades.

### **Startup Drama**
**[5] Sequoia accused of 'dual-pricing'**
Mercor's Brendan Foody calls out valuation practices in venture capital.

**[6] Sam Altman's Tools for Humanity layoffs**
Identity verification company reportedly struggling with revenue generation.

**[10] Apple waives AI costs for small developers**
Eliminating cloud API costs for developers with under 2M App Store downloads.

Would you like me to dive deeper into any specific story, or would you prefer news from a different technology category?
